signals.headline: Oregon GOP Gubernatorial Debate Confirmed: Top Candidates Including Chris Dudley Set for Thursday in Hillsboro** | **YES
signals.raw:
Oregon GOP Gubernatorial Debate Confirmed: Top Candidates Including Chris Dudley Set for Thursday in Hillsboro** | **YES** | **MED** confidence[3].  
Chris Dudley, a leading Republican candidate challenging incumbent Democrat Tina Kotek in the May 19 primary, will join Danielle Bethell, Ed Diehl, and Christine Drazan for the event, amid voter frustration over crime, homelessness, and costs[1][3].
matched_markets: Will J.D. Vance win the 2028 Republican presidential nominat
Will Chris Dudley win the 2026 Oregon Governor Republican primary election?

signals.headline: Iran Signals Resumption of Peace Talks with US, Triggering Crypto Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran Signals Resumption of Peace Talks with US, Triggering Crypto Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin broke above $75,000 (up 5.9%), XRP hit $1.38 (up 4.2%), and Solana rose 6.3% to $86.55 amid a broad market rally following Iran's peace talk signal, easing Middle East war pressures.[1][3]

signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Weekly ETF Inflows ($119
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Weekly ETF Inflows ($119.6M), Outpacing Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP led digital asset inflows last week at $119.6M (strongest since Dec 2025), with YTD at 7% of AUM; Solana third at $34.9M (YTD 10% AUM), signaling institutional shift.[3][6] US XRP ETFs saw $12M April inflows after March outflows.[6]

signals.headline: Solana Teases XRP Integration via Cryptic X Post | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Teases XRP Integration via Cryptic X Post | YES | MED confidence**  
Solana's X post fueled speculation, with RippleX responding; wrapped XRP expanding DeFi on Solana (via Hex Trust), alongside Solana powering X cash tags.[4][7][8] XRP hit $1.39 on the buzz.[7]
